---
id: check-eligibility
title: "Check recipient eligibility"
description: "Checks if a recipient is eligible to claim a stream from the Merkle airdrop campaign."
sidebar_label: "Check recipient eligibility"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/airdrops/merkle-api/sablier-merkle-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Check recipient eligibility"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/api/eligibility"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

Checks if a recipient is eligible to claim a stream from the Merkle airdrop campaign.

This endpoint:

1. Retrieves the campaign's IPFS file
2. Extracts the recipient list and Merkle tree
3. Searches for the provided wallet address
4. Returns the recipient's claim details and Merkle proof

## Prerequisites

To check eligibility for an address, you'll need:

- The recipient's address
- The CID of the IPFS file linked to the campaign

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"} children={"Request"}></Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    {
      name: "address",
      in: "query",
      required: true,
      description: "The Ethereum address of the recipient",
      schema: { type: "string", pattern: "^0x[a-fA-F0-9]{40}$", example: "0x1234567890123456789012345678901234567890" },
    },
    {
      name: "cid",
      in: "query",
      required: true,
      description: "IPFS content identifier for the campaign file",
      schema: { type: "string", example: "QmYwAPJzv5CZsnA625s3Xf2nemtYgPpHdWEz79ojWnPbdG" },
    },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={"Body"} body={undefined}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    "200": {
      description: "Eligibility information retrieved successfully",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            required: ["address", "amount", "index", "proof"],
            properties: {
              address: {
                type: "string",
                description: "Address of the requested recipient",
                pattern: "^0x[a-fA-F0-9]{40}$",
                example: "0x1234567890123456789012345678901234567890",
              },
              amount: {
                type: "string",
                description: "Amount the recipient is eligible for",
                example: "1000000000000000000",
              },
              index: { type: "integer", description: "Position of the recipient in the list", minimum: 0, example: 42 },
              proof: {
                type: "array",
                description: "Merkle proof (array of hashes)",
                items: { type: "string", pattern: "^0x[a-fA-F0-9]{64}$" },
                example: [
                  "0xabcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890",
                  "0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef",
                ],
              },
            },
            title: "EligibilityResponse",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "400": {
      description: "Invalid request (e.g., invalid address format, invalid CID)",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            required: ["error"],
            properties: {
              error: {
                type: "string",
                description: "Error message describing what went wrong",
                example: "Invalid address format",
              },
            },
            title: "Error",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "404": {
      description: "Address not found in the campaign",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            required: ["error"],
            properties: {
              error: {
                type: "string",
                description: "Error message describing what went wrong",
                example: "Invalid address format",
              },
            },
            title: "Error",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "500": {
      description: "Internal server error",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            required: ["error"],
            properties: {
              error: {
                type: "string",
                description: "Error message describing what went wrong",
                example: "Invalid address format",
              },
            },
            title: "Error",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
